description: Camera dolly track improperly secured. Noticed by grip before use. Track re-secured and checked by Safety Officer.
actionTaken: Track re-secured. All crew reminded of equipment checks pre-shoot.

description: Crew member sustained minor cut to hand during Art Dept prep. First aid administered on set by Sarah Thompson.
actionTaken: Wound cleaned and dressed. No further medical attention required. Crew member returned to work.
